channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Daily Zimbabwe Economy
channel.description: Daily Zimbabwe economy briefing — one analytical infographic per day rotating through GDP, trade, remittances, mining, services, and the unrecorded balance. All data from ZimStat and the Reserve Bank of Zimbabwe.

item.title: Zim trade balance 2025 Q4: $486M trade surplus on goods. Exports $3.2B, imports $2.7B.
item.description: Zimbabwe exported $3.2B of goods and imported $2.7B in 2025 Q4 — a trade surplus of $486M. The goods balance flipped to surplus in 2024 on lithium, gold and tobacco. Full briefing: mutapatimes.com/economy
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
